Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class ContentWorkspacePermission

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.ContentWorkspacePermission
public class ContentWorkspacePermission extends SObject

Java class for ContentWorkspacePermission complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ContentWorkspacePermission">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PermissionsAddComment" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PermissionsAddContent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PermissionsAddContentOBO" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PermissionsArchiveContent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PermissionsChatterSharing" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PermissionsDeleteContent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PermissionsDeliverContent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PermissionsFeatureContent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PermissionsManageWorkspace" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PermissionsModifyComments" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PermissionsOrganizeFileAndFolder" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PermissionsTagContent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PermissionsViewComments" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
